headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund cruised to a 3-0 win over FC Copenhagen in their Champions League opener on Tuesday, with U.S. star Gio Reyna getting two assists.
headlines.shortLinkText: Reyna gets 2 assists as BVB start UCL with win

headlines.description: Dinamo Zagreb condemned Chelsea to the worst possible start to their Champions League campaign with a 1-0 victory at the Stadion Maksimir, Zagreb.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dinamo Zagreb upset Chelsea in UCL opener

headlines.description: Alejandro Grimaldo scored a stunning long-range goal as Benfica eased to a 2-0 victory over Maccabi Haifa in their first Champions League fixture.
headlines.shortLinkText: Grimaldo lifts Benfica to win over Maccabi Haifa

headlines.description: Real Madrid overcame an impressive Celtic performance to start the defence of their Champions League crown with an eventually comfortable 3-0 win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid beat Celtic 3-0 to start UCL title defence

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappe scored a pair of first half goals as Paris Saint-Germain held on to beat Juventus 2-1 in their Champions League group stage opener.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappe scores two as PSG hold off Juventus

headlines.description: Marian Shved scored twice in a dream debut for Shakhtar Donetsk as the Ukrainians crushed hosts RB Leipzig 4-1 in Champions League Group F.
headlines.shortLinkText: Shakhtar stun Leipzig 4-1 with Shved double

headlines.description: AC Milan midfielder Alexis Saelemaekers earned the Serie A title holders a 1-1 draw at Austrian side Salzburg in their Champions League opener.
headlines.shortLinkText: Milan held to draw at Salzburg in UCL opener

headlines.description: Erling Haaland scored twice as Manchester City opened their Champions League campaign with a 4-0 victory away at out-of-form Sevilla on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland strikes twice as City sink Sevilla in UCL

headlines.description: Ajax overwhelmed Rangers 4-0 in Champions League Group A at the Johan Cruyff Arena on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ajax thrash Rangers 4-0 in UCL group stage

headlines.description: — English forward Marcus Edwards scored one goal and set up another to help Sporting Lisbon defeat Eintracht Frankfurt 3-0 and spoil the German club’s Champions League debut on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sporting Lisbon spoils Frankfurt's Champions League debut

headlines.description: A goal in the 11th minute of stoppage-time by Antoine Griezmann earned Atletico Madrid a 2-1 home win over 10-man Porto in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Griezmann, Atleti stun 10-man Porto in wild win

headlines.description: Robert Lewandowski scored a superb hat trick in his first Champions League outing for Barcelona as they beat Viktoria Plzen 5-1 on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lewandowski fires hat trick for Barca in UCL win

headlines.description: Teenager Abakar Sylla scored the only goal just before halftime as hosts Club Brugge beat Bayer Leverkusen 1-0 in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Teenager Sylla gives Brugge win over Leverkusen

headlines.description: Bayern Munich's Leroy Sane scored one goal and forced an own goal by Inter Milan as they beat the Italian side 2-0 away in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sane dazzles as Bayern cruise past Inter

headlines.description: Liverpool were rocked by a dominant Napoli as the Premier League side fell to a 4-1 defeat in the Champions League group stage on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Napoli ease to 4-1 victory over Liverpool in UCL

headlines.description: Richarlison's first goals for Tottenham Hotspur helped them mark their return to the Champions League with a 2-0 victory over 10-man Marseille.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tottenham beat Marseille on Richarlison brace

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur conceded two stoppage-time goals to suffer a 2-0 defeat at the hands of Sporting CP in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sporting stun Tottenham with last-gasp strikes

headlines.description: Inter Milan's Edin Dzeko scored one and created another as they cruised to a 2-0 victory over Viktoria Plzen in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dzeko guides Inter to win over Viktoria Plzen

headlines.description: — Robert Lewandowski was among several Barcelona players to rue missed chances on his return to his former team in a 2-0 loss at Bayern Munich in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lewandowski frustrated on Bayern return as Barça loses 2-0

headlines.description: Club Brugge pulled off a shock 4-0 win at FC Porto on Tuesday to win a second successive Champions League Group B game and go top of the standings.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brugge shock Porto with 4-0 away triumph

headlines.description: Liverpool secured a last-gasp 2-1 victory over Ajax on Tuesday to kickstart their Champions League campaign this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Matip header earns Liverpool win over Ajax

headlines.description: Marseille's chances of reaching the knockout phase of the Champions League were dented when they were beaten 1-0 at home by Eintracht Frankfurt.
headlines.shortLinkText: Marseille's UCL hopes dented by Eintracht loss

headlines.description: AC Milan secured their first Champions League win this season with a 3-1 victory over Dinamo Zagreb at home in Group E on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giroud leads AC Milan past Dinamo Zagreb

venue.fullName: Stadion Legii Warszawa im. Jozefa Pilsudskiego

headlines.description: Shakhtar Donetsk and Celtic played out a gripping 1-1 draw in their second Champions League Group F game on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Shakhtar rally for Champions League draw with Celtic

venue.displayName: Stadion Legii Warszawa im. Jozefa Pilsudskiego

headlines.description: Graham Potter got off to a disappointing start as Chelsea boss after FC Salzburg scored a late equalizer to grab a 1-1 draw at Stamford Bridge.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea held to frustrating draw in Potter's debut

headlines.description: FC Copenhagen held Sevilla to a scoreless draw as both sides picked up their first point of their Champions League Group G campaign.
headlines.shortLinkText: Copenhagen hold Sevilla to goalless UCL draw

headlines.description: Juventus are without a point from their first two Champions League matches after suffering a 2-1 home loss to Benfica.
headlines.shortLinkText: Juventus sink to home UCL loss to Benfica

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappe and Lionel Messi combined superbly in PSG's near-perfect start to the season with a 3-1 win at Maccabi Haifa in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi, Mbappe, Neymar rescue PSG against Haifa

headlines.description: Erling Haaland's stunning strike completed a 2-1 comeback win for Manchester City against his former club Dortmund in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland acrobatic winner sinks Dortmund in UCL

headlines.description: Real Madrid midfielder Federico Valverde scored a superb second-half goal while Marco Asensio struck late to fire the holders to a 2-0 win at home.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Valverde goals sees Real Madrid past Leipzig

headlines.description: Bayern Munich beat Viktoria Plzen 5-0 in the Champions League on Tuesday to set a record for the longest unbeaten run in group matches.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern rout Viktoria Plzen 5-0 for new record

headlines.description: Marseille secured their first Champions League win of the season when they came from behind to outclass 10-man Sporting Lisbon 4-1 on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Marseille thrash Sporting at empty ground in CL

headlines.description: Giacomo Raspadori netted twice as Napoli came from behind to deliver a masterclass and score a runaway 6-1 win at 10-man Ajax Amsterdam.
headlines.shortLinkText: Napoli hit six past 10-man Ajax in record defeat

headlines.description: Club Brugge beat Atletico Madrid 2-0 at home on Tuesday to extend their unbeaten run on Champions League Group B this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brugge upset Atletico 2-0 to remain unbeaten

headlines.description: Tottenham squandered a string of chances and failed to get a shot for more than 80 minutes, settling for a goalless draw at Eintracht Frankfurt.
headlines.shortLinkText: Misfiring Tottenham draw at Eintracht Frankfurt

headlines.description: Porto substitutes Zaidu and Galeno were both on target as they beat Bayer Leverkusen 2-0 on Tuesday to seal the Portuguese side's first victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Porto beat Leverkusen 2-0 to earn first Champions League win

headlines.description: Barcelona are in danger of failing to make it out of the Champions League group phase after a 1-0 loss to Inter Milan on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barca in UCL danger after 1-0 loss at Inter

headlines.description: Liverpool eased past Rangers with a routine 2-0 victory in Champions League Group A at Anfield on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: TAA, Salah help Liverpool ease past Rangers

headlines.description: RB Leipzig earned their first Champions League win of the season with a 3-1 home win over Celtic in Group F on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leipzig ease past Celtic to earn first UCL win

headlines.description: A second-half penalty from Noah Okafor earned FC Salzburg a 1-0 home win over Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Okafor gives Salzburg win over Dinamo Zagreb

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain had to settle for a 1-1 draw at Benfica in their Champions League game despite another well-struck goal from Lionel Messi.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi sets UCL record but PSG held by Benfica

headlines.description: — Another goal for Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang. A first clean sheet. A comprehensive dismantling of the Italian champions in a must-win game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea eases Champions League concerns by dismantling Milan

headlines.description: Juventus got their first points in the Champions League after Angel Di Maria got a hat trick of assists in a 3-1 win against Maccabi Haifa.
headlines.shortLinkText: Di Maria sets up 3 as Juve beat Maccabi

headlines.description: Erling Haaland continued his incredible start to life at Manchester City with another double in their 5-0 demolition of FC Copenhagen.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland scores 2 more as City crush Copenhagen

headlines.description: Real Madrid hung on for a nervy 2-1 Champions League win over Shakhtar Donetsk at the Bernabeu on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid made to work for nervy Shakhtar win

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund struck three times in the first half to beat hosts Sevilla 4-1 in their Champions League Group G match on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bellingham leads Dortmund in Sevilla thrashing

headlines.description: — The Manchester City juggernaut ground to a halt in the unlikeliest of places on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Without Haaland, 10-man Man City held 0-0 by FC Copenhagen

headlines.description: Maccabi Haifa won their first Champions League game in 20 years when Omer Atzili's double helped the Israeli side beat Juventus 2-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Juventus' last-16 hopes hit with loss to Haifa

headlines.description: Chelsea continued their strong start under new manager Graham Potter with a 2-0 win over AC Milan at the San Siro on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea ease past Milan to top UCL Group E

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund's Jude Bellingham came to the rescue to earn a 1-1 draw against visitors Sevilla in their Champions League Group G match.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bellingham nets again in Dortmund-Sevilla draw

headlines.description: Celtic's hopes of reaching the Champions League round of 16 ended with a 2-0 defeat against RB Leipzig on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leipzig defeat sends Celtic crashing out of UCL

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain were held to a 1-1 draw by Benfica in their Champions League Group H clash on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappe scores but PSG held to draw by Benfica

venue.fullName: Stadion Legii Warszawa im. Jozefa Pilsudskiego

headlines.description: Antonio Rudiger scored a last-minute equalizer as he collided with the Shakhtar Donetsk goalkeeper to keep Real Madrid undefeated this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Rudiger strike sends Madrid into UCL last-16

venue.displayName: Stadion Legii Warszawa im. Jozefa Pilsudskiego

headlines.description: Belgian side Club Brugge reached the Champions League knockouts after a 0-0 draw against Atletico Madrid on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brugge hold Atleti, reach first-ever CL last-16

headlines.description: Napoli kept up their flawless record in the Champions League group phase with a 4-2 win over Ajax on Wednesday to advance to the knockout stages.
headlines.shortLinkText: In-form Napoli beat Ajax to reach UCL last 16

headlines.description: Robert Lewandowski rescued Barcelona's Champions League round-of-16 hopes with two late goals to earn his side a 3-3 draw with Inter Milan.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lewandowski brace saves Barca in Inter draw

headlines.description: Galeno starred as Porto cruised to a 3-0 victory at Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Porto's Galeno sparkles in 3-0 win at Leverkusen

headlines.description: Mohamed Salah came off the bench and scored a the fastest hat trick in Champions League history in Liverpool's 7-1 win over Rangers on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah nets 6-min hat trick, Liverpool rout Rangers 7-1

headlines.description: Olympique de Marseille boosted their chances of reaching the Champions League last 16 with a 2-0 victory at nine-man Sporting on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sanchez leads Marseille past nine-man Sporting

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur came from behind to claim a 3-2 victory over 10-man Eintracht Frankfurt in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs come from behind to edge 10-man Frankfurt

headlines.description: Bayern Munich cruised past Viktoria Plzen 4-2 on Wednesday, putting them through to the knockout round of the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern trounce Plzen to reach UCL knockout round

headlines.description: FC Salzburg_Chelsea
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea into UCL last 16 with win vs. Salzburg

headlines.description: Sevilla kept alive their slim hopes of reaching the Champions League last 16 after a 3-0 win over 10-man FC Copenhagen.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sevilla sink Copenhagen 3-0 to stay alive in UCL

headlines.description: Benfica's Rafa Silva scored two superb goals as they edged Juventus 4-3 in a thriller at Estadio da Luz on Wednesday to seal a last-16 spot.
headlines.shortLinkText: Benfica end Juve's UCL dreams in 7-goal thriller

headlines.description: Manchester City's Riyad Mahrez spurned a penalty as Pep Guardiola's side were held to a 0-0 draw by Borussia Dortmund at the Signal Iduna Park.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund hold Man City to reach UCL knockouts

headlines.description: Shakhtar Donetsk earned a 1-1 draw at Celtic in the Champions League on Tuesday to maintain the Ukrainian side's chances of reaching the last 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Celtic crash out of Europe after draw with Shakhtar

headlines.description: AC Milan revived their hopes of reaching the Champions League last 16 with a 4-0 win at Dinamo Zagreb in Group E on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Milan thrash Zagreb to revive Champions League hopes

headlines.description: RB Leipzig took a big step closer to the Champions League knockout stage with a 3-2 home win over Real Madrid on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: RB Leipzig put Real Madrid's group win on hold

headlines.description: FC Porto boosted their hopes of progress in the Champions League with a convincing 4-0 victory away at Group B leaders Club Brugge.
headlines.shortLinkText: Porto boost Champions League last-16 hopes with win at Brugge

headlines.description: Inter Milan sailed into the Champions League last 16 after an Edin Dzeko double fired them to a 4-0 home win over Viktoria Plzen in Group C.
headlines.shortLinkText: Inter beat Viktoria Plzen, advance to UCL last 16

headlines.description: Ajax Amsterdam_Liverpool
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool thrash Ajax, qualify for UCL last 16

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid missed a stoppage-time penalty in a 2-2 draw at home to Bayer Leverkusen, which ended their Champions League last-16 hopes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atleti out of UCL after chaotic draw with Bayer

headlines.description: Bayern Munich beat Barcelona at the Camp Nou on Wednesday night to advance to the Champions League round of 16 as group winners.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern beat Barca to advance as group winners

headlines.description: Eintracht Frankfurt muscled their way past Olympique Marseille 2-1 on Wednesday to leave Champions League Group D wide open.
headlines.shortLinkText: Frankfurt stay alive with 2-1 win over Marseille

headlines.description: — Tottenham's bid to reach the Champions League knockout stage will go down to the last group-stage game after VAR denied Harry Kane a late winner against Sporting Lisbon on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Conte furious as VAR denies Spurs late winner vs. Sporting

headlines.description: Club Brugge finished second in their Champions League group after drawing 0-0 at Bayer Leverkusen on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brugge finish 2nd, Leverkusen 3rd after draw

headlines.description: Goals from Mehdi Taremi and Stephen Eustaquio helped Porto to a 2-1 win against Atletico Madrid, condemning them to an early European exit.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atletico Madrid out of Europe after Porto defeat

headlines.description: Bayern Munich completed a perfect group stage by beating Inter Milan 2-0 thanks to goals from Benjamin Pavard and Eric Maxim Choupo-Moting.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern beat Inter to finish perfect group stage

headlines.description: Liverpool bounced back from defeat against Leeds United with a hard-fought 2-0 victory against Napoli.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah, Nunez help Liverpool to victory vs. Napoli

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur survived a scare in Marseille before fighting back to win 2-1 and clinch a place in the Champions League last 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs survive in Marseille to reach UCL last 16

headlines.description: Ajax made sure of a place in the Europa League by beating Rangers 3-1 on Tuesday to heap further Champions League misery on the Scottish club.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rangers condemned to worst-ever UCL record

headlines.description: Eintracht Frankfurt staged a second-half comeback to beat hosts Sporting 2-1 on Tuesday and qualify for the Champions League round of 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eintracht rally to reach first-ever UCL knockouts

headlines.description: Ferran Torres scored in each half as Barcelona eased past Victoria Plzen 4-2 in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barcelona cruise past Plzen in final UCL group game

headlines.description: Real Madrid beat Celtic 5-1 at home to finish top of their Champions League group on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid thump Celtic 5-1 to win UCL group

headlines.description: Christopher Nkunku scored one goal and set up another as RB Leipzig crushed Shakhtar Donetsk 4-0 on Wednesday to reach the Champions League last-16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leipzig cruise past Shakhtar to reach UCL last 16

venue.displayName: Stadion Legii Warszawa im. Jozefa Pilsudskiego

headlines.description: Olivier Giroud scored two goals and created another as AC Milan crushed Salzburg 4-0 on Wednesday to reach the Champions League knockout stages.
headlines.shortLinkText: Milan thrash Salzburg to book last-16 spot

headlines.description: Chelsea's Denis Zakaria scored on his debut as his side finished their Champions League Group E campaign with a 2-1 win over Dinamo Zagreb.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea beat Dinamo Zagreb as Chilwell injured

headlines.description: FC Copenhagen scored their first goal in this season's Champions League campaign as they drew 1-1 with already qualified Borussia Dortmund.
headlines.shortLinkText: Copenhagen break UCL duck in draw with BVB

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappe scored and set up the winner for PSG as they beat Juventus in the Champions League only to finish second to Benfica in their group.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG beat Juve, but finish shock 2nd to Benfica

headlines.description: Benfica completed a 6-1 win at Maccabi Haifa on Wednesday to stunningly overhaul PSG at the top of Champions League Group H.
headlines.shortLinkText: Benfica win 6-1 to top UCL group ahead of PSG

headlines.description: — Julian Alvarez may never replicate Erling Haaland’s sheer goal-scoring power. But the Argentine showcased his value to Manchester City by scoring one goal and creating two more in a 3-1 win against Sevilla in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Alvarez inspires Man City CL win in absence of Haaland

headlines.description: — An early goal was enough for troubled AC Milan to edge Tottenham 1-0 on Tuesday in its first Champions League knockout match in nearly 10 years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Milan tops Tottenham for winning return to CL knockout stage

headlines.description: — Not even Kylian Mbappé's substitute appearance could end Paris Saint-Germain's slump, as it lost 1-0 at home to Bayern Munich on Tuesday in the first leg of their round-of-16 Champions League clash.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé can't save slumping PSG in CL loss to Bayern Munich

headlines.description: — Lots of talent, but not the results to match. It's becoming a familiar story for Chelsea.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund beats slumping Chelsea 1-0 in Champions League

headlines.description: Benfica set a foot in the Champions League next round after a 2-0 victory in Belgium over Brugge.
headlines.shortLinkText: Benfica take 2-goal advantage over Brugge

headlines.description: — Victor Osimhen scored again Tuesday to help Napoli to a 2-0 win at Eintracht Frankfurt in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie.
headlines.shortLinkText: Osimhen scores, Napoli beats Frankfurt 2-0 in Champs League

headlines.description: — While both Real Madrid and Liverpool are rightly considered Champions League royalty, there can only be one king.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid routs Liverpool 5-2 in CL stunner at Anfield

headlines.description: Substitute Romelu Lukaku volleyed an 86th-minute goal to earn Inter Milan a 1-0 win over Porto in their Champions League last 16 first leg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Lukaku goal gives Inter 1st leg win vs. Porto

headlines.description: — Joško Gvardiol stifled the threat of Manchester City star Erling Haaland before scoring himself to earn Leipzig a 1-1 draw in the first leg of their round-of-16 matchup in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City held 1-1 by Leipzig in last 16 of Champions League

headlines.description: Clinical Benfica thrashed shell-shocked Club Brugge 5-1 to knock them out of the Champions League and reach the quarter finals 7-1 on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: Benfica crush Brugge 5-1 to reach UCL 1/4 finals

headlines.description: — Kai Havertz fired Chelsea into the Champions League quarterfinals to ease the pressure on under fire manager Graham Potter.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea beats Dortmund 2-0, advances to Champions League QF

headlines.description: — Lionel Messi and Kylian Mbappé will have to wait another year for a chance to win the Champions League with Paris Saint-Germain.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG eliminated by Bayern Munich in Champions League last 16

notes.text: 2nd Leg - AC Milan advance 1-0 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - AC Milan advance 1-0 on aggregate

headlines.description: — AC Milan's Champions League credentials were barely tested by Tottenham as the seven-time winners advanced to the quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: AC Milan reaches Champions League QF with 0-0 draw at Spurs

headlines.description: Inter Milan reached the Champions League quarterfinals for the first time in more than a decade after surviving a late barrage of pressure at Porto.
headlines.shortLinkText: Inter make UCL quarters after wild finish at Porto

headlines.description: Erling Haaland made history with five goals to send Manchester City into the quarterfinals in emphatic fashion with a 7-0 win over RB Leipzig.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland makes history as City thrash Leipzig 7-0

headlines.description: Victor Osimhen scored twice to give Napoli a 3-0 win over Eintracht Frankfurt to reach the Champions League quarterfinals for the first time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Osimhen fires Napoli to first-ever UCL 1/4 final

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 6-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 6-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: — There was no historic comeback for Liverpool. Real Madrid's title defense in the Champions League rolls into the quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid beats Liverpool to reach Champions League QF

headlines.description: Inter Milan struck in the second half to earn a 2-0 win at Benfica in their Champions League quarterfinal, first leg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Advantage Inter after UCL win over Benfica

headlines.description: — Manchester City took a huge step toward a third straight Champions League semifinals after a 3-0 win against Bayern Munich on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City beats Bayern 3-0 in Champions League quarterfinals

headlines.description: — AC Milan beat Napoli for the second time in the space of less than two weeks — and this time with more at stake — as the Rossoneri won 1-0 in the first leg of their Champions League quarterfinal on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: AC Milan beats 10-man Napoli 1-0 in Champions League QF

headlines.description: — Karim Benzema struck yet again against Chelsea, and Real Madrid is a step closer to eliminating the English club for the second straight season in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vinícius, Benzema lead Real Madrid past Chelsea 2-0 in CL

headlines.description: — Serie A champion last season. A Champions League semifinalist this season.

headlines.description: — His 48th goal for Manchester City this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland fires Man City into CL semifinals vs. Real Madrid

headlines.description: Inter drew 3-3 with Benfica Wednesday to win their Champions League quarterfinal 5-3 on aggregate and will face rivals AC Milan in the last four.
headlines.shortLinkText: Milan derby awaits Inter after ousting Benfica

headlines.description: Superb goals from Vinicius Junior and Kevin De Bruyne saw Real Madrid and Manchester City draw 1-1 in their Champions League semifinal first leg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid, City trade stunning goals to leave SF tied
